nasb.text: They will not take from you even a stone for a corner Nor a stone for foundations, But you will be desolate forever,” declares the Lord.

esv.text: No stone shall be taken from you for a corner and no stone for a foundation, but you shall be a perpetual waste, declares the Lord.

cnv.text: “人必不從你那裡取石頭作房角石， 也不從你那裡取石頭作基石， 因為你必永遠荒涼。” 這是耶和華的宣告。

ccb.text: 再无人用你的石头做房角石或基石， 你要永远荒凉。 这是耶和华说的。
